editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 18 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 18 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: Nelson Mandela International Day — 18 July
articles.summary: Nelson Mandela International Day (18 July) marks Mandela’s birthday and promotes 67 minutes of community service for peace and equality.
articles.summary_hi: नेल्सन मंडेला अंतर्राष्ट्रीय दिवस (18 जुलाई) मंडेला की जयंती — शांति और समानता के लिए 67 मिनट सामुदायिक सेवा।
articles.content:
Nelson Mandela International Day is observed every year on 18 July, Mandela’s birth anniversary (born 1918). The UN declared this day in 2009.

Mandela led South Africa’s anti-apartheid struggle, spent 27 years in prison, and became the country’s first Black President (1994–1999). He received the Nobel Peace Prize in 1993 (shared with F.W. de Klerk).

The day encourages people to devote 67 minutes to helping others — one minute for each year of Mandela’s public service.

For IB ACIO: date (18 July), UN day (2009), Nobel Peace Prize (1993), and 27 years in prison are key facts.
articles.content_hi:
18 जुलाई — मंडेला जयंती (जन्म 1918)। UN ने 2009 में घोषित।

27 वर्ष जेल, 1994 प्रथम Black राष्ट्रपति, Nobel Peace Prize 1993। 67 मिनट सेवा।

IB ACIO: 18 July, 2009, 1993 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Nelson Mandela International Day is observed on:
articles.question_hi: नेल्सन मंडेला अंतर्राष्ट्रीय दिवस कब मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: It is observed on 18 July, Nelson Mandela’s birthday.
articles.explanation_hi: यह 18 जुलाई को मंडेला की जयंती पर मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Apartheid was South Africa’s racial segregation system. Mandela’s party: African National Congress (ANC).
articles.moreInfo_hi: Apartheid: नस्लीय भेदभाव। मंडेला की पार्टी: ANC।

articles.title: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) — Article 315
articles.summary: UPSC is a constitutional body under Article 315 that conducts recruitment exams for All India and Central Services.
articles.summary_hi: UPSC धारा 315 के तहत संवैधानिक निकाय — अखिल भारतीय और केंद्रीय सेवाओं की भर्ती परीक्षाएं।
articles.content:
The Union Public Service Commission is provided for under Article 315 of the Constitution. It conducts examinations for appointments to the services of the Union, including Civil Services Examination (IAS, IPS, IFS, etc.).

The Chairman and members are appointed by the President. They can be removed only in the manner prescribed (similar safeguards as high constitutional offices).

UPSC also advises the government on recruitment methods, promotions, and disciplinary matters for civil servants (as specified).

For IB ACIO: Article 315, Civil Services Exam, and President’s appointment are polity essentials. Note: IB ACIO itself is conducted by MHA/SSC framework — UPSC is the all-India services gateway.
articles.content_hi:
UPSC धारा 315। Civil Services Exam (IAS, IPS, IFS)।

अध्यक्ष/सदस्य राष्ट्रपति नियुक्त। भर्ती, पदोन्नति पर सलाह।

IB ACIO: धारा 315 — याद रखें।
articles.question: UPSC is a constitutional body under which Article?
articles.question_hi: UPSC संविधान की किस धारा के तहत संवैधानिक निकाय है?
articles.explanation: Article 315 provides for Public Service Commissions for the Union and the States.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 315 संघ और राज्यों के लिए लोक सेवा आयोगों का प्रावधान करती है।
articles.moreInfo: State PSCs also under Article 315. Contrast ECI (324), CAG (148).
articles.moreInfo_hi: राज्य PSC भी धारा 315। तुलना: ECI (324), CAG (148)।

articles.title: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao — Girl Child Empowerment
articles.title_hi: बेटी बचाओ बेटी पढ़ाओ — बालिका सशक्तिकरण
articles.summary: BBBP aims to improve the Child Sex Ratio and promote education and empowerment of the girl child across India.
articles.summary_hi: BBBP का लक्ष्य बाल लिंगानुपात सुधारना और बालिका शिक्षा व सशक्तिकरण।
articles.content:
Beti Bachao Beti Padhao was launched in 2015 from Panipat, Haryana, to address the declining Child Sex Ratio (CSR) and promote girls’ education.

It is a joint initiative of the Ministry of Women and Child Development, Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, and Ministry of Education.

Focus areas: preventing gender-biased sex selection, ensuring survival and protection of the girl child, and education/participation. Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana complements financial savings for the girl child.

For IB ACIO: launch (2015, Panipat), three ministries, and CSR focus are scheme facts.
articles.content_hi:
BBBP 2015, Panipat (Haryana)। तीन मंत्रालय: WCD, स्वास्थ्य, शिक्षा।

लिंगानुपात, सुरक्षा, शिक्षा। Sukanya Samriddhi पूरक।

IB ACIO: 2015, Panipat — याद रखें।
articles.question: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao was launched from which place in 2015?
articles.question_hi: बेटी बचाओ बेटी पढ़ाओ 2015 में कहाँ से शुरू हुई?
articles.explanation: BBBP was launched from Panipat, Haryana in January 2015.
articles.explanation_hi: BBBP जनवरी 2015 में पानीपत, हरियाणा से शुरू हुई।
articles.moreInfo: Sukanya Samriddhi Account is a small savings scheme for the girl child under the Ministry of Finance.
articles.moreInfo_hi: सुकन्या समृद्धि खाता बालिका के लिए छोटी बचत योजना।

articles.title: Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) — Routes and Cap
articles.title_hi: प्रत्यक्ष विदेशी निवेश (FDI) — मार्ग और सीमा
articles.summary: FDI enters India via Automatic Route or Government Route. DPIIT formulates FDI policy under the Consolidated FDI Policy.
articles.summary_hi: FDI Automatic Route या Government Route से आता है। DPIIT समेकित FDI नीति बनाता है।
articles.content:
Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) is investment by a foreign entity in an Indian business with lasting interest and control. It differs from FPI (portfolio investment in stocks/bonds).

Under the Automatic Route, no prior government approval is needed (subject to sectoral caps). Under the Government Route, approval from the concerned ministry/competent authority is required.

DPIIT (Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade) under the Ministry of Commerce & Industry issues the Consolidated FDI Policy. Some sectors remain prohibited (e.g., lottery, gambling).

For IB ACIO: Automatic vs Government Route, DPIIT role, and FDI vs FPI distinction.
articles.content_hi:
FDI: स्थायी हित वाला निवेश। FPI: पोर्टफोलियो।

Automatic Route: पूर्व अनुमति नहीं। Government Route: अनुमति जरूरी। DPIIT नीति जारी करता है।

IB ACIO: दो मार्ग, DPIIT — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which department issues India’s Consolidated FDI Policy?
articles.question_hi: भारत की Consolidated FDI Policy कौन सा विभाग जारी करता है?
articles.explanation: DPIIT under the Commerce Ministry formulates and issues the Consolidated FDI Policy.
articles.explanation_hi: वाणिज्य मंत्रालय के अंतर्गत DPIIT Consolidated FDI Policy जारी करता है।
articles.moreInfo: RBI regulates FEMA-related reporting of FDI inflows. SEBI regulates securities markets/FPI.

articles.title: Atmanirbhar Defence — Positive Indigenisation Lists
articles.summary: The Ministry of Defence issues Positive Indigenisation Lists to ban import of specified defence items and boost domestic manufacturing.
articles.summary_hi: रक्षा मंत्रालय Positive Indigenisation Lists जारी करता है — निर्दिष्ट वस्तुओं का आयात बंद, घरेलू निर्माण बढ़ावा।
articles.content:
Under Atmanirbhar Bharat in defence, the Ministry of Defence has notified multiple Positive Indigenisation Lists (PILs). Items on these lists cannot be imported after specified timelines and must be procured from Indian industry.

This supports DPSUs, private defence firms, and MSMEs. Related reforms include higher FDI in defence manufacturing, defence corridors (UP and Tamil Nadu), and iDEX for startups.

India aims to increase defence exports and reduce import dependence while modernising the Armed Forces.

For IB ACIO: Positive Indigenisation Lists, defence corridors (UP & TN), and iDEX are Atmanirbhar defence keywords.
articles.content_hi:
Positive Indigenisation Lists: आयात प्रतिबंध, भारतीय उद्योग से खरीद।

Defence corridors: UP और Tamil Nadu। iDEX startups।

IB ACIO: PIL, UP-TN corridors — याद रखें।
articles.question: India’s defence industrial corridors have been set up in which states?
articles.question_hi: भारत के रक्षा औद्योगिक गलियारे किन राज्यों में स्थापित हैं?
articles.explanation: Two defence industrial corridors are in Uttar Pradesh and Tamil Nadu.
articles.explanation_hi: दो रक्षा औद्योगिक गलियारे उत्तर प्रदेश और तमिलनाडु में हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Tejas, INS Vikrant, BrahMos — indigenous/joint capability examples from earlier editions.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Tejas, Vikrant, BrahMos — पहले संस्करण।

articles.title: NISAR Mission — NASA–ISRO Earth Observation Satellite
articles.title_hi: NISAR मिशन — NASA–ISRO पृथ्वी अवलोकन उपग्रह
articles.summary: NISAR is a joint NASA–ISRO radar satellite to map Earth’s land and ice changes with high precision for disaster and climate monitoring.
articles.summary_hi: NISAR NASA–ISRO संयुक्त रडार उपग्रह — भूमि और बर्फ परिवर्तन मानचित्रण, आपदा व जलवायु निगरानी।
articles.content:
NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar) is a dual-frequency SAR Earth observation mission jointly developed by NASA and ISRO.

It will measure Earth’s surface changes — ice sheets, forests, wetlands, and earthquakes — useful for agriculture, disaster management, and climate science.

ISRO provides the spacecraft bus, S-band SAR, and launch; NASA provides the L-band SAR and major radar systems. It is among the most expensive Earth-observation collaborations for India–US space ties.

For IB ACIO: joint NASA–ISRO, dual-frequency SAR, and Earth-change mapping purpose.
articles.content_hi:
NISAR: NASA + ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar। भूमि/बर्फ परिवर्तन माप।

ISRO: spacecraft, S-band, launch। NASA: L-band SAR।

IB ACIO: NASA–ISRO संयुक्त, SAR — याद रखें।
articles.question: NISAR is a joint Earth-observation mission of ISRO and which agency?
articles.question_hi: NISAR ISRO और किस एजेंसी का संयुक्त पृथ्वी-अवलोकन मिशन है?
articles.explanation: NISAR is a joint mission of NASA and ISRO.
articles.explanation_hi: NISAR NASA और ISRO का संयुक्त मिशन है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Chandrayaan-3, Aditya-L1, PSLV editions for ISRO GK.

articles.title: Quad — India, USA, Japan, Australia Grouping
articles.title_hi: क्वाड — India, USA, Japan, Australia समूह
articles.summary: The Quad is a strategic grouping of India, the USA, Japan, and Australia focused on a free, open, and inclusive Indo-Pacific.
articles.summary_hi: क्वाड: India, USA, Japan, Australia — मुक्त, खुला और समावेशी Indo-Pacific।
articles.content:
The Quadrilateral Security Dialogue (Quad) brings together India, the United States, Japan, and Australia. It was revived in 2017 after an earlier start post-2004 tsunami cooperation.

Quad is not a formal military alliance like NATO. Focus areas include maritime security, critical and emerging technologies, climate, health security, and infrastructure.

Leaders’ summits and foreign ministers’ meetings guide cooperation. India balances Quad engagement with its strategic autonomy and other partnerships (SCO, BRICS).

For IB ACIO: four members, Indo-Pacific focus, and ‘not a military alliance’ are exam favourites.
articles.content_hi:
Quad: India, USA, Japan, Australia। 2017 में पुनर्जीवित।

NATO जैसा सैन्य गठबंधन नहीं। समुद्री सुरक्षा, तकनीक, जलवायु, स्वास्थ्य।

IB ACIO: 4 सदस्य, Indo-Pacific — याद रखें।
articles.question: Which of the following is NOT a member of the Quad?
articles.question_hi: निम्न में से कौन Quad का सदस्य नहीं है?
articles.explanation: Quad members are India, USA, Japan, and Australia — not South Korea.
articles.explanation_hi: Quad सदस्य: India, USA, Japan, Australia — South Korea नहीं।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: NATO (11 July), SCO (15 July), BRICS (13 July).
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: NATO, SCO, BRICS — पहले संस्करण।

articles.title: Project Elephant — Conserving India’s Elephants
articles.title_hi: प्रोजेक्ट एलीफेंट — भारत के हाथियों का संरक्षण
articles.summary: Project Elephant (1992) protects wild elephants, their habitats, and corridors, and addresses human–elephant conflict.
articles.summary_hi: प्रोजेक्ट एलीफेंट (1992) जंगली हाथी, आवास, गलियारे संरक्षण और मानव-हाथी संघर्ष।
articles.content:
Project Elephant was launched in 1992 by the Government of India to protect elephants, their habitat, and corridors, and to address man–animal conflict.

It is implemented by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change. Elephant Reserves have been notified across elephant landscapes in India.

India has the largest population of Asian elephants. Gaj Yatra and World Elephant Day (12 August) also raise awareness. MIKE (Monitoring the Illegal Killing of Elephants) is a CITES programme.

For IB ACIO: launch year (1992), contrast with Project Tiger (1973), and MoEFCC implementation.
articles.content_hi:
Project Elephant 1992। MoEFCC। Elephant Reserves।

भारत में सबसे अधिक Asian elephants। World Elephant Day: 12 अगस्त।

IB ACIO: 1992; Project Tiger 1973 — तुलना।
articles.question: Project Elephant was launched in which year?
articles.question_hi: प्रोजेक्ट एलीफेंट किस वर्ष शुरू हुआ?
articles.explanation: Project Elephant was launched in 1992; Project Tiger was launched in 1973.
articles.moreInfo: Related: Project Tiger (14 July), International Tiger Day preview (15 July).
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Project Tiger, International Tiger Day।

articles.title: Fundamental Duties — Article 51A
articles.summary: Fundamental Duties were added by the 42nd Amendment (1976) on the recommendation of the Swaran Singh Committee — currently 11 duties.
articles.summary_hi: मौलिक कर्तव्य 42वें संशोधन (1976) से — स्वर्ण सिंह समिति सिफारिश; वर्तमान में 11 कर्तव्य।
articles.content:
Fundamental Duties are listed in Article 51A (Part IVA) of the Constitution. They were added by the 42nd Constitutional Amendment Act, 1976, based on the Swaran Singh Committee recommendations.

Originally 10 duties; the 86th Amendment (2002) added the 11th duty — parents/guardians to provide education to children aged 6–14.

Duties include respecting the Constitution and National Flag/Anthem, cherishing freedom struggle ideals, protecting environment, and developing scientific temper. They are non-justiciable (not directly enforceable by courts like Fundamental Rights).

For IB ACIO: Article 51A, 42nd Amendment, Swaran Singh, and 11 duties (86th Amendment).
articles.content_hi:
धारा 51A, भाग IVA। 42वां संशोधन 1976, स्वर्ण सिंह समिति।

मूल 10; 86वां संशोधन (2002) से 11वां — 6–14 वर्ष शिक्षा। गैर-न्याय्य।

IB ACIO: 51A, 11 कर्तव्य — याद रखें।
articles.question: Fundamental Duties were added to the Constitution by which Amendment?
articles.question_hi: मौलिक कर्तव्य संविधान में किस संशोधन द्वारा जोड़े गए?
articles.explanation: The 42nd Amendment Act, 1976 added Fundamental Duties (Article 51A).
articles.explanation_hi: 42वें संशोधन अधिनियम, 1976 ने मौलिक कर्तव्य (धारा 51A) जोड़े।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Preamble 42nd Amendment words (17 July edition).
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: प्रस्तावना में 42वें संशोधन के शब्द (17 जुलाई)।

articles.title: Thomas Cup — India’s Historic Badminton Triumph
articles.title_hi: थॉमस कप — भारत की ऐतिहासिक बैडमिंटन जीत
articles.summary: India won the Thomas Cup for the first time in 2022, defeating Indonesia in the final — a landmark in Indian badminton.
articles.summary_hi: भारत ने 2022 में पहली बार Thomas Cup जीता, फाइनल में Indonesia को हराया।
articles.content:
The Thomas Cup is the men’s world team badminton championship, organised by the Badminton World Federation (BWF). The Uber Cup is the women’s equivalent.

India lifted the Thomas Cup for the first time in 2022 at Bangkok, defeating 14-time champions Indonesia 3–0 in the final. Key players included Lakshya Sen, Kidambi Srikanth, and the doubles pair of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty.

This victory marked India’s rise as a badminton power alongside P.V. Sindhu and Saina Nehwal’s Olympic/World successes.

For IB ACIO: Thomas Cup (men), Uber Cup (women), India’s first win 2022 — sports GK.
articles.content_hi:
Thomas Cup: पुरुष विश्व टीम बैडमिंटन। Uber Cup: महिला।

भारत पहली जीत 2022, Bangkok, Indonesia हराया।

IB ACIO: Thomas Cup 2022 — याद रखें।
articles.question: India won its first Thomas Cup title in which year?
articles.question_hi: भारत ने अपना पहला Thomas Cup किस वर्ष जीता?
articles.explanation: India won the Thomas Cup for the first time in 2022 in Bangkok.
articles.explanation_hi: भारत ने 2022 में Bangkok में पहली बार Thomas Cup जीता।
articles.moreInfo: BWF governs world badminton. Related: Chess Olympiad gold (15 July).
articles.moreInfo_hi: BWF विश्व बैडमिंटन। संबंधित: Chess Olympiad (15 जुलाई)।
